_methodology: Jegham et al. 2025 - AWS PUE 1.14, CIF 0.287 kgCO2e/kWh. Output factor = 6x input across every family (the paper's decode/prefill energy ratio); water factor = co2 factor x 3.32/287 (~0.0115679 L/gCO2e).
_cache_read_factor: Energy of a cache_read token as a fraction of an uncached input token. Engineering estimate (~0.08, defensible range 0.05-0.15) derived from the decode-phase KV re-read residual. NOT the provider 0.1x billing ratio (a price, not energy). See METHODOLOGY.md.
_models: CO2 emission factors per model FAMILY. Claude families (fable/opus/sonnet/haiku) are the original measured/extrapolated set. The provider-agnostic tiers (frontier/mid/small/default) cover every other agent tokscale tracks (OpenAI, Google, xAI, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, Llama, ...). A model string is mapped to a family by family_patterns below.
_water: Water = inference energy x water intensity. WIF = onsite WUE 0.18 + offsite EWIF 3.14 = 3.32 L/kWh; CIF 287 gCO2e/kWh. Per-model water factor = co2_factor x 3.32/287 (~0.0115679 L/gCO2e). Conservative/over-estimate: uses US-grid average electricity-water (EWIF), not the more efficient hyperscaler-region mix. Sources: AWS 2024 sustainability WUE; Li et al. 2023 (arXiv:2304.03271); Reig et al./WRI EWIF 3.14; EESI. See METHODOLOGY.md.

_provenance.frontier: extrapolated: Opus-tier proxy for frontier non-Anthropic models (gpt-5, o-series, *-pro, grok-4, deepseek-r). Estimate.
_provenance.mid: extrapolated: Sonnet-tier proxy for mid non-Anthropic models (gpt-4 class, gemini, glm, kimi, qwen, llama, mistral). Estimate.
_provenance.small: extrapolated: Haiku-tier proxy for small/fast models (*-mini, *-nano, *-flash, *-lite, 7b/8b). Estimate.
_provenance.default: extrapolated: Sonnet-tier fallback for any real model not matched by a more specific pattern. Low-confidence estimate.

_family_patterns: Ordered list mapping a model string to a family. First case-insensitive regex match wins; if none match, the family is 'default'. Specific (small/frontier) patterns are listed before generic ones so e.g. 'gpt-5-mini' resolves to small, not frontier.
_exclude_models: Models stored with co2_grams=0, water_liters=0 and excluded=1, and left out of footprint aggregates. '<synthetic>' is Claude Code's marker for non-billed synthetic turns (no real inference). Add case-insensitive regex patterns to exclude local/test models by name.
